# Sirr — Full LLM context

## Brand summary

Sirr (https://sirr.no) is an AI Career Intelligence Platform. The product helps users:
1. Find opportunities with AI relevance and match scoring
2. Win applications with tailored CVs and cover letters
3. Grow careers with planning, salary forecasting, and skills roadmaps

Target market emphasis: Norway (Finn.no, NAV, Norwegian job search workflows), with English support.

## Homepage

URL: https://sirr.no/

Sirr positions itself as a serious SaaS platform for modern career progression. Core message: move from fragmented job search to one intelligent workspace.

Key capabilities highlighted:
- Match score and relevance
- Kanban-style application flow
- Long-term career planning (5–15 year horizon)

## Features

URL: https://sirr.no/features

Feature areas:
- Job matching: match score, AI relevance, recommendations
- Application tracker: kanban workflow, deadlines, follow-ups, status tracking
- AI tailored CVs: role-specific resume generation and keyword optimization
- AI cover letters: personalized letters from extracted job context
- Chrome extension: save jobs from LinkedIn, Finn.no, NAV, and company sites
- Career planning: roadmap, salary growth, skills planning, recommendations
- Career intelligence: AI insights, long-term planning, application analytics

## Pricing

URL: https://sirr.no/pricing

Plans:
- Free: manual job saving, basic tracker, limited AI generations, basic match insights
- Pro (149 NOK/month): Chrome extension, unlimited tracker, AI CV/cover letter generation, salary forecasting, skills roadmap

Fair usage limits apply.

## FAQ

URL: https://sirr.no/faq

Q: Hva er Sirr?
A: Sirr er en AI-drevet karriereplattform som hjelper deg finne relevante stillinger, vinne søknader og vokse i karrieren.

Q: Er Sirr en jobbportal?
A: Nei. Sirr kombinerer matching, dokumentgenerering, sporing og langsiktig planlegging.

Q: Kan jeg lagre jobber fra LinkedIn og Finn?
A: Ja. Sirr støtter jobbimport fra LinkedIn, Finn.no, NAV og bedriftssider.

Q: Er Chrome-utvidelsen inkludert i gratisplanen?
A: Nei. Chrome-utvidelse er en del av Pro-planen.

Q: Hvordan fungerer AI-CV?
A: Sirr bruker stillingskontekst og profilen din til å lage rolle-spesifikke CV-utkast.

Q: Finnes det en gratis plan?
A: Ja. Du kan starte med en gratis plan.

## About

URL: https://sirr.no/about

Sirr's mission is to turn job-search chaos into an organized, AI-assisted career workflow.

## Contact

URL: https://sirr.no/contact

Use the contact page for product questions, partnerships, and early access conversations.

## Keywords for retrieval

Sirr, AI karriere, jobbsøk Norge, Finn.no, LinkedIn stillinger, NAV, CV generator, søknadsbrev, søknadssporing, karriereplan, matchscore, Chrome-utvidelse, karriereintelligens
